3011840.name: RPG Maker MZ - Last Boss Pack Vol.6
3011840.description:
Features:

* Battlers and backgrounds for your boss encounters!
* 10 battlers with spritesheet
* 10 Battle background in both 816x624 and 1000x740 sizes
* 10 battler .psd files included for better battle action! (you need editing software to use these files, editing software not included)
* Bonus graphics with battlers and backgrounds together! (64 sheets!)


Terms of Use:

* This pack is for use in RPG Maker Series or the engine of your choice.
* OK to be used in Commercial projects
* Contents can be edited
* OK for use in games with gore
* OK for use in adult-rated games
3011840.supported_languages: 英语, 日语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 俄语, 简体中文, 繁体中文, 韩语
